codeReview.summary: The feature contract is satisfied. fetchUniswapV3PoolSnapshots now requests ascending poolDayDatas and defensively sorts normalized snapshots by date before returning, and the provider test suite includes a regression case that fails if upstream data arrives reverse-chronologically.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, commit 23f4154d3feb1910bebd3c62fafe77847845dae3, transcript skeleton, skill guidance, and current HEAD implementation. The Graph snapshot ordering hardening is present in src/providers/thegraph.ts and is covered by a targeted regression test in tests/thegraph-provider.test.ts, with no feature-scoped issues found.
